creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
Created attachment 150049
Window-shot illustrating the problem

The left column at https://www.freebsd.org/support.html contains a link to "Submit a problem report". The link points at the same URL -- instead of https://bugs.freebsd.org/submit/

In the attached window-shot, the wrong link can be seen inside the magenta rectangle. The green rectangle outlines the correct link.
